material_claims.claim: All 123 combined transcript records map at high confidence to distinct items in a 124-item public playlist.
Atlas Brew #7 is separately preserved as a medium-confidence machine transcript with 1,820 timestamped segments.
The public playlist is a complete history of Atlas Brew.
material_claims.reason: Private, deleted, region-restricted, or omitted recordings may not be visible.

material_claims.claim: YouTube upload dates are the dates of the live discussions.
material_claims.reason: The reconciliation establishes upload metadata, not event occurrence time.

known_limitations: Atlas Brew #7 ASR has not received line-by-line human correction.
Event dates, hosts, guests, and original-platform lineage remain incomplete.
